title: ExternalFact
description: Schema for a single entry in the append-only external facts ledger (.github/ai-state/external-facts.ndjson). Each entry is evidence sourced from outside the AI-native control plane. Aligned with docs/ai-native/external-facts-schema.md.

factType.description: Dot-namespaced fact category. E.g. ci.failure, dep.security-patch, human.priority-change.

subject.description: What the fact is about. E.g. issue number, package name, service URL.

claim.description: The factual assertion. Must be specific enough to be verifiable.

capturedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the fact was recorded.

sourceReliability.description: How the fact was sourced. Determines downstream consumer weight.

sourceUrl.description: URL or identifier for the external source. Must not contain credentials.

capturedBy.description: Who recorded the fact. E.g. human:taoyu, script:ci-watcher.

relatedIssue.description: GitHub issue number this fact informs.

relatedPr.description: GitHub PR number this fact informs.

expiresAt.description: When this fact becomes stale. Ongoing facts omit this.

meta.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata. Must not contain secrets.
